title: Ceviche with Herring and Ethiopian Spices
description: A refreshing and flavorful dish that combines the tanginess of ceviche with the bold flavors of Ethiopian spices and the delicate taste of herring.
instructions: Rinse the herring fillets under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced onion and diced tomato.
Add the lemon juice, olive oil, and Ethiopian spices to the bowl and mix well.
Add the herring fillets to the bowl and mix gently to coat with the marinade.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, stir in some chopped fresh cilantro or parsley if desired.
Serve the ceviche chilled, garnished with additional cilantro or parsley if desired.
